calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. appearing represented by Jonathan Vaknin Esq. in court.
Defendant Kelli Deseelhorst appeared in court.

Mr. Vaknin communicated to the court the parties have reached and agreement in this matter and would like to dismiss this matter without prejudice.

Today's matter goes off calendar and Mr. Vaknin was instructed to Efile a Request for Dismissal if he would like the entire action dismissed.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Continued To Feb-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Kelli Deseelhorst

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:57am and concluding at 11:07am.

Plaintiff Bank of America is present represented by Robert Kennard
Defendant Kelli Deseelhorst is present

Ms. Deseelhorst is asking for a mercy forgiveness of this debt. The court continues this matter to February 18, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow both parties an oppertunity to meet and confer to possibly reach an settlement in this matter.
